channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 8th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montagu Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins/flytipping, 8th March
item.description:
This is a regular problem. Rubbish is always dumped outside this property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human faeces, 8th March
item.description:
Saturday night excrement outside a residential entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Campbell Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large patches of stinging nettles, 8th March
item.description:
The grass was cut this week but large patches of stinging nettles were not. Some of the patches are behind fences (knee to hip tall) but others are in open areas that children or dogs might wander into. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): William Cory Promenade, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Width restriction pole missing, 8th March
item.description:
Needs replacing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, unlocked car abandoned in Birkbeck Road, Sidcup., 8th March
item.description:
Poorly parked vehicle, oart on pavement, jutting into road. Abandoned.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag left on the street, 8th March
item.description:
Bin bag left out will soon be ripped open

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Wood Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two bikes on pavement, 8th March
item.description:
Two bikes have been left outside my home directly on the pavement so people cannot pass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Chaseley Street, Limehouse, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins permanently left on pavement near bus stop, 193 Coldharbour Lane, 8th March
item.description:
The bins at 193 Coldharbour Lane (possibly also 191 - both numbers are on the door, red door) have been left on the public pavement for over a year. The residents do not return them to their property boundary after collection. Because the bins are next to a bus stop, passers-by use them to dispose of litter, causing them to overflow within days of each collection. This creates a pavement obstruction and a persistent waste problem in a high-footfall area. I reported this previously on 11 February 2026 (reference 8897372) but nothing has changed. I have also submitted a formal complaint to Lambeth Council's complaints team.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herne Hill Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog excrement, 8th March
item.description:
On gras verge. Massive amount must be big dog.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackthorn Grove, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste left on top of little bin blowing around street, 8th March
item.description:
Domestic waste abandoned what weigh

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Needleman Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wires expose, 8th March
item.description:
Worsley Bridge Road by Meadiwview Road Electrical covert has been removed and wires exposed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - wires exposed on bus shelter

item.title: Flytipping at Timberpond Road, 8th March
item.description:
There is flytipping along Timberpond Road opposite the Bacon’s College sports pitches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Timber Pond Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken manholes and potholes, 8th March
item.description:
Grouped section of sunken manholes and potholes. Very dangerous to cyclists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Black Prince Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken manhole, 8th March
item.description:
Manhole has sunk and is exposed. This has been getting progressively worse for a couple of months and is very dangerous to cyclists and a risk of cause vehicle tyre damage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salamanca Place, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long term unresolved by council fly tipping, 8th March
item.description:
General Rubbish including toilet, white goods, building mess etc regularly dumped on street and never removed - countless complaints made to council but never dealt with. Residents would love street improvements like greening/planting to encourage pride in the space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walcorde Avenue, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human or dog waste, 8th March
item.description:
Multiple piles of poo on the gravel walkway up to the Thames past just next to the Cumberland wharf green space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127-135, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken kerbstone trip hazard, 8th March
item.description:
Sunken kerbstone trip hazard. Council recently fixed a huge pothole round the corner from this but just left this broken and exposed causing severe trip risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Black Prince Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken manhole asphalt breaking up, 8th March
item.description:
Sunken manhole asphalt breaking up. Council recently fixed a huge pothole right next to this but just left this broken and exposed causing tyre damage risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Black Prince Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 8th March
item.description:
There are two bags of rubbish (seemingly business related) on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
